releases.author: thesamim
releases.description:
This is a BETA release! Use with Caution.

Readme.md and documentation have not been updated.

Did I mention: use with caution?
What's Changed

Feature: Introduce the ability to sync Notes between TickTick and Obsidian
Chore: Bump version
Chore: Clean up build foo.
Chore: Clean up logging
Fix: when users find there are tasks not being updated, re-logging in will magically reset the checkpoint to bring EVERYTHING back.

## What's Changed
* Merge hell branch by @thesamim in https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/217
* FIX: Missed changes. by @thesamim in https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/218


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/compare/1.0.41...1.1.0-beta
releases.name: 1.1.0-beta

releases.author: thesamim
releases.description:
thesamim
Owner
[thesamim](https://github.com/thesamim) commented [Feb 21, 2024](https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/pull/67#issue-2147515475)

chore: update packages and versions
remove extraneous update/get
fix: handle midnight hour correctly, correct time zone differences
Update Change log
Update README.md
fix: number of bug fixes
timezone, date, date conversion foo
update cache timing
If only one project synced, only sync its tasks from Obsidian
fix: accept separators -_/ in Tags.
closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/57
closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/63
closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/62
closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/58
closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/57
closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/53
closes https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/issues/64

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/thesamim/TickTickSync/compare/1.0.16...1.0.17

releases.author: thesamim
releases.description:
While I've done extensive manual testing, I cannot guarantee that I have covered ALL use cases.

I strongly recommend that you test with a new vault and, preferably, a new TickTick account so you don't mess up your current tasks.
